expect: P2-P7 mechanisms (classify_mutation, proofread, recombination) exist under different names. 11/12 slots filled. F-DNA1 PARTIALLY RESOLVED.
actual: 11/12 mechanism slots confirmed. Selection: compact.py + UCB1 (2/3, genesis_selector.py removed). Proofreading: 4/4 (check.sh, validate_beliefs, correction_propagation, contract_check). Recombination: 3/3 (knowledge_recombine, frontier_crosslink, historian_router). Gap: per-change mutation classification only at session-level (change_quality.py), not knowledge-unit level.
diff: Expected 11/12: CONFIRMED. No surprise in coverage count. Key insight: the convergence pattern itself — frontiers that stall as construction projects close through utility-driven tooling. This is a meta-finding about how swarm resolves questions (convergent evolution > planned construction).
method: Manual mapping of F-DNA1 requested mechanisms to current tool inventory. Existence check via filesystem. Knowledge_recombine.py stats: 2890 missing edges, 56.1% cross-domain.
